channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #187 - 2026-07-13
item.description:
🚨 Why Elegoo Chose Emoji® to Introduce More People to 3D Printing When Elegoo unveiled the world’s first officially licensed emoji®-themed 3D printer, it wasn’t just launching another version of an existing machine. The company was testing a much bigger idea by, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jul 12, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/328302/why-elegoo-chose-emoji-to-introduce-more-people-to-3d-printing

💻 This open-source Tinkercad alternative is my new favorite way to design 3D prints in a browser - How-To Geek This open-source Tinkercad alternative is my new favorite way to design 3D prints in a browser How-To Geek Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jul 12, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxOMGYzLVpPbzBueUNCQW8taGxEbXBQemxVQmw1MHVzZlBQZ0Q1ckhmUXpqaE5SWmR2eHBsU0labGhtSG5YcjZ0Q3lXZmFYYTFBNFhVTUJzTEtaenRwbnpKY2pLNmxDX1VRYnQ5V0JCaFREU0dzS0phelNYZWh2b2ctTmFYTTN5SlhhZkhoWEF6eEJZQnNGR0pwVg?oc=5

🏠 USS Essex uses embarked 3D printers to cut supply chain delays Wasp-class amphibious assault ship USS Essex (LHD 2) and Combat Logistics Battalion 13, 13th Marine Expeditionary Unit, are using embarked 3D printers to produce replacement parts and tools rather than … The post USS... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 12, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/USS-Essex-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/uss-essex-uses-embarked-3d-printers-to-cut-supply-chain-delays

🚀 Dash-CAE to display LFAM-enabled carbon monocoque at Goodwood Dash-CAE, a UK-based engineering and composites specialist, is displaying its Large Format Additive Manufacturing-enabled tooling and composite production process at the Goodwood Festival of Speed this weekend. The company has … The post Dash-CAE to display LFAM-enabled carbon monocoque at Goodwood appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/DASH-CAE-Goodwood-2026_01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/dash-cae-to-display-lfam-enabled-carbon-monocoque-at-goodwood

🖨 Stop treating your 3D printer like a vending machine for other people's models - How-To Geek Stop treating your 3D printer like a vending machine for other people's models How-To Geek Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jul 12, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipwFBVV95cUxOdTctb21TS2o4cDFxVVU3UTBkNDZCWjZTT1ViZDB3OW9nWGJod213SHVFc2oyQzAwTDNQYnJiU1ZzX2paR053RkFpU0lMbjY5WGdQWHl2RGtqVWJqZHNNNkFlWlJXSlc4Um5seFpURUpHdDQwTTNRT3BhaWd0RG5zNnVSbFZSMDNXZWU5WDlwaGJkbHF3MzdHeWFhVy16djZkSTBKcGRlVQ?oc=5

🖨 54 Fun And Useful Things People Printed With Their 3D Printers - AOL.com 54 Fun And Useful Things People Printed With Their 3D Printers AOL.com Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jul 12, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTE9wRjdLa0NkUG9QdXZZRmw3VzJSUUc3dGNLOC1va0xyZ2xhbXNSYVNFbnlnYTVXUzdUS2JzclBEZ0ZGSkVXQzRJa3ZZbF9VemxjWFJLZGM4YVYtOF9Na1BHNEZTUWRBUHVtdVJtVFN2dnZhWEMxN1FIWWdiQnBxUQ?oc=5

🖨 China's 'digital kids' drive surging popularity of 3D printers - Nikkei Asia China's 'digital kids' drive surging popularity of 3D printers Nikkei Asia Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jul 12, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPSTJDN1ItYWhQNjFRNmpaY2RSb2xGYjFESko0SGRNUEo0eXhaR0VFck5qQks3bnc4S3M0Q2U2YXJMSlVrdkpEbGRjTnhfUXVqSnVDTFQwTDM2OEZrY0o1T3pDU1RUaWtFRWd5RXJFVlpYa1pBSXRRcHh1WEhjZ3M2SDBEd1FUcjBKU1hqMW5tMnpFVnZMNElPM3U3QS00TzRxRFlxNQ?oc=5

🖨 Two US states introduce legislation to prevent production of guns on 3D printers - Notebookcheck Two US states introduce legislation to prevent production of guns on 3D printers Notebookcheck Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jul 12, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxNZzBTLUFfeFI0a05veGR4V0hiamdsa0RIeFFodFlXb1FOakZhdTExQlNmeGZWcUI1SVctUVBpZWZVNDZsNFJWMU5tcVVxWWF6VDBubGZWZU45YWpMMFUzNVBBMm5ncS1HdGQ0QkhGMEJiM0hPRGpGVGpNTWQtdEl1VmYtYmV5bF9VRV96ZTVYMjdFZE9jZ1FMeFNXR1gtRTNJejJ6WjRXYlFHeVNUUURsd1h2ZTFPbzdpbDhRUWdUeDQ0YUE?oc=5

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #186 - 2026-07-12
item.description:
🚨 Bambu Lab Turns Filament Sales into Earthquake Relief for Venezuela Chinese 3D printer manufacturer Bambu Lab is launching a 48-hour community fundraising drive for Venezuela’s earthquake recovery, running from July 13 at 8:00 a.m. through July 15, 2026, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 11, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/image3-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/bambu-lab-turns-filament-sales-into-earthquake-relief-for-venezuela-252989

🚨 Revopoint Launches Trackit SR, a Wireless Intelligent Optical Tracking 3D Scanner with Industrial-grade Accuracy - The National Law Review Revopoint Launches Trackit SR, a Wireless Intelligent Optical Tracking 3D Scanner with Industrial-grade Accuracy The National Law Review Reported by Google News - 3D Scanners on Jul 06, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxNcHV6VkxhMXFiZ1lZeTZGQkdOaERJc0ZhUXpJYmNJUVZjenFqTFlVRmV3Rl9HeFNVNXJ1LW0zSEZvalJSREthdnV0cEY4R05SQjVBQWVUZGphRHlZQjdwUkwzaFctRDltQ2h4VWxZempLOHFCY050Ny03TDg2N3dkSjAwc1B4b1pkYXZ2Nzd5ekowWHNhdTFTTTdDT0dpR19hYnlXTmtqX05TbFg2SHow?oc=5

📷 New TSA 3D airport scanners may be a problem for your carry-on bags - Bergen Record New TSA 3D airport scanners may be a problem for your carry-on bags Bergen Record Reported by Google News - 3D Scanners on Jul 11, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

💻 3DCeram Sinto and Avignon Ceramic detail ceramic 3D printing partnership in new video 3DCeram Sinto has released a video detailing a co-development partnership with Avignon Ceramic, a French ceramic injection molding (CIM) manufacturer that has expanded into ceramic 3D printing since 2017. The … The post 3DCeram Sinto and Avignon Ceramic detail ceramic 3D printing partnership in new video appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/3DCeram-Sinto-and-Avignon-Ceramic-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/3dceram-sinto-and-avignon-ceramic-detail-ceramic-3d-printing-partnership-in-new-video

🖨 Beehive Industries Bets Big on Ultra-Large-Format Metal AM with Multi-Unit NXG 600E Order Denver-based Beehive Industries has placed a multi-unit order for NXG 600E metal 3D printers from Nikon SLM Solutions, part of Nikon Advanced Manufacturing. The purchase is entirely self-funded and gives the company a capability that remains scarce in the United States: ultra-large-format laser powder bed fusion capacity, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 11, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/nxg-600e-serial-production-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/beehive-industries-bets-big-on-ultra-large-format-metal-am-with-multi-unit-nxg-600e-order-252995

💻 Tripo AI raises $150M in Series A3 round 3D foundation model developer Tripo AI has closed a $150 million Series A3 funding round, drawing investment from companies across the automotive, gaming, internet, and technology sectors. Geely Capital was among the automotive-side backers, joined by other strategic investors from that sector, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 11, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Segv2-Visual-Demo-1-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/tripo-ai-raises-150m-in-series-a3-round-253013

💻 Phillips Corporation renames Hybrid division Phillips Advanced Manufacturing Solutions Phillips Corporation has renamed its Hybrid division Phillips Advanced Manufacturing Solutions (AMS) and promoted Brian Kristaponis to president of the unit. The Hanover, Maryland-based manufacturing technology supplier said the new … The post Phillips Corporation renames Hybrid division Phillips Advanced Manufacturing Solutions appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Phillips-Advanced-Manufacturing-Solutions-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/phillips-corporation-renames-hybrid-division-phillips-advanced-manufacturing-solutions

🖨 Kentstrapper Releases the 1 Cubic Meter Material Extrusion Mille System for €40,000 Kentstrapper makes Material Extrusion systems in Italy. Now the firm has released the 1,000 × 1,000 × 1,000 mm build volume Mille system, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jul 10, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/328422/kentstrapper-releases-the-mille-1-cubic-meter-material-extrusion-system-for-e40000

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #185 - 2026-07-11
item.description:
🔥 Nottingham and Berkeley researchers curb overcuring defects in volumetric 3D printing Researchers at the University of Nottingham and the University of California, Berkeley, have developed a resin chemistry that curbs the overheating responsible for warped and fused parts in computed axial … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 10, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/volumetric-3D-printing-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/nottingham-and-berkeley-researchers-curb-overcuring-defects-in-volumetric-3d-printing

🚨 Revopoint Trackit SR: Tracking 3D scanner for launch with discount code cheaper - 3Druck.com Revopoint Trackit SR: Tracking 3D scanner for launch with discount code cheaper 3Druck.com Reported by Google News - 3D Scanners on Jul 06, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxOMnFCanFBcGNKMlM3cVF6VFg5TFlmWUZFTERkMm1ER0prdEFCU0hxLWN5eWpmamxvT1NlNFNJZmw0ZUZjQWZkeDJheVJjSFFHdDRwQy1NUXBpSTVuN29fZFE2SXVnTE5YdWQ4V3ZDTklsa2Y5OXQtU000bENLRnRERnlVa0FEUm12cmY4akh1SGdCY1hGek5mQU5mckZzNC1hMmxmeTl1Z0dBc2Itek1JZ2kyWTBfd052?oc=5

🚨 Prusa and Bondtech: INDX Conversion Kit for CORE One goes into production - 3Druck.com Prusa and Bondtech: INDX Conversion Kit for CORE One goes into production 3Druck.com Reported by Google News - Hotend Swap Toolchanger on Jul 06, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOU3pTa24wbUJMVmRlb0dNclhqNkxNWHc4ck1EVExaQ19mT0sxLU5MX0FCQm5RVThzdDlWWV9aUGh5TEJzTzFfV3JCeGUzR0tveGtBb1gxWkFlMlFoaTQ2QWVPVVltYlVNcHRHUzFWNk9UR1lDc1Fia0R2bUJRR1JWZ0JSa19wblZkdmpxdGZidzI3blNZSXhvakdNVWwydTE4Zm5PbHR5M3lfQm9reUhVNV84ZlE3WWRLay1V?oc=5

📷 I wasn't sure the Creality Sermoon P1 Scanner would handle shiny objects – then this happened - Creative Bloq I wasn't sure the Creality Sermoon P1 Scanner would handle shiny objects – then this happened Creative Bloq Reported by Google News - 3D Scanners on Jul 01, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivwFBVV95cUxONTl1T0FsZGIxTGFKMXlTanN1RzhLd0EtM2tJdVg2ZmQ5RExHRVRLclRFcTRORzFHUVBGX2E3NmsySU80RWlUMWwwUUhHNmpYS1YyNUEtQ3RCMWFudUx2dXJraVdHY3lsM3hSeGRCRVVjcGowd3RzTm45TGQyNGloY1E0ZlpLZW5QTGMzREdiS2FreHhxM0JmTVBuTmtidlM2azBpcGFGN1c0WEhuS2x0QkFfZVo0bmpwdlJlc09nNA?oc=5

💻 Proxima Fusion raises €411 million to build Europe’s fusion demonstrator Proxima Fusion closed a €411 million ($468 million) Series A2 financing round on July 7, 2026, pushing its valuation to €2.4 billion ($2.7 billion) and making it Europe’s best-funded fusion … The post Proxima Fusion... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 10, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Proxima_Fusion_Stellarator_683da92aca71d268d0b8e972_Copy-of-2025-02-05_Proxima_Fusion_FV_0248-min-1-1-780x470-1-150x150.webp Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/proxima-fusion-raises-e411-million-to-build-europes-fusion-demonstrator

🖨 How Ferrita customized a Mercedes Benz SLR McLaren exhaust using Wire-LMD Ferrita Sweden AB is a Swedish company that develops and manufactures advanced technical solutions in sound attenuation, vibration, thermal insulation and exhaust gas purification, such as catalyst and particle... The metal additive manufacturing technology developed by Meltio—which involves using a laser to melt a metal wire using a welding technique—has been validated by…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 10, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/ferrita-1.bmp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/how-ferrita-customized-a-mercedes-benz-slr-mclaren-exhaust-using-wire-lmd-252968

💻 Zaha Hadid Architects Prints a Six-Meter Tower for Terminal Expo The Tech Lab of Zaha Hadid Architects (ZHA) has completed a six-meter-tall 3D printed model of an air traffic control tower, produced for the practice’s ZHAviation exhibition stand at Passenger Terminal Expo 2026 in... Built from an original ZHA tower design, the installation ranks among the most technically demanding fabrication efforts the Lab has…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 10, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Zaha_Hadid_Architects_Passenger_Terminal_Expo_2026-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/zaha-hadid-architects-prints-a-six-meter-tower-for-terminal-expo-252975

💻 Homberger brings AMF zero-point clamping system to AM post-processing Homberger, the Genoa-based Italian distributor of AMF (Andreas Maier Fellbach) clamping technology, presented its zero-point clamping system for substrate plates, positioning the module as a fix for one of additive …... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 10, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/1_addittive_manufacturing-150x150.webp Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/homberger-brings-amf-zero-point-clamping-system-to-additive-manufacturing-post-processing

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #184 - 2026-07-10
item.description:
🚨 State of INDX – July 2026 Update: Founder’s Edition Shipping + What’s Next The Bondtech INDX Founder’s Edition is out in the wild - huge congrats to our friends from Bondtech! :-) With that milestone behind us, we’re moving to the next phase: shipping the “standard” INDX Conversion Kit for CORE One/+, reported by Prusa Blog on Jul 03, 2026. Image ? https://storage.googleapis.com/prusa3d-content-prod-14e8-wordpress-blog-prod/2026/07/f36f75c4-indx_july_2026_update__2222x1031-698x325.jpg Read more ? https://blog.prusa3d.com/indx_july_2026_update_137377

🚨 Revopoint introduces the Trackit SR, a new 3D scanner with Intelligent Optical Tracking - 3DVF Revopoint introduces the Trackit SR, a new 3D scanner with Intelligent Optical Tracking 3DVF Reported by Google News - 3D Scanners on Jul 07, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxQcEZCajVCRll4aWlab3BWdzR5bTViLWtXeXgwY3BlbW9DbFYtVFgxaDdQa2IxOEQ5cHJRUWo1bGZ0cWJkMGZqT2VzeGNub0lZMW9kMUxsVGg3RVRmbjVmX3p3eEg5MDd6Q3hvQ3FsSXR4cDJ6M3N2UXJqajZjaVFYZVZ1TnFlS0JKSV90WFVZSW9qOFBfVHo1enhUNGJ6YS1vSkREUWo4bktDV2c?oc=5

📷 A 1,700-Year-Old Board Game Is Being Played Again Thanks to 3D Scanning and Printing A stone board used nearly two millennia ago by the inhabitants of Roman Britain has been given a new lease on life thanks to 3D technology. The project was developed by researchers at Newcastle University in collaboration with the Vindolanda…, reported by 3D Natives on Jul 09, 2026. Image ? https://www.3dnatives.com/en/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/Roman-board-game-cover.jpg Read more ? https://www.3dnatives.com/en/3d-printed-roman-board-game-09072026

📷 The Maker’s Toolbox: Creality Sermoon P1 3D Scanner - Hackster.io The Maker’s Toolbox: Creality Sermoon P1 3D Scanner Hackster.io Reported by Google News - 3D Scanners on Jul 03, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

💻 New Maker Day and Dealer Matching at Formnext Asia Shenzhen Formnext Asia Shenzhen is adding a dedicated maker day and an international dealer matching session to its 2026 program, both aimed at communities that sit outside its traditional industrial exhibitor base. The event runs August 26 to 28, 2026 at the Shenzhen World Exhibition and Convention Center, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 10, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Fairground5-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/new-maker-day-and-dealer-matching-at-formnext-asia-shenzhen-252964

🖨 Hyliion deploys metal additive manufacturing to deliver more efficient power generation CEO Thomas Healy recently joined the Additive Insight podcast. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jul 10, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/07/KARNO-Beta-design-high-polish-render-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/hyliion-deploys-metal-additive-manufacturing-to-deliver-more-efficient-power-generation

🖨 DAIHEN enters metal 3D printing with the ArcBuilder 3D DAIHEN, a Japanese heavy-electrical manufacturer with roughly $1.5 billion in annual sales, unveiled the ArcBuilder 3D, its first product in metal additive manufacturing, and has begun accepting orders. The system … The post DAIHEN enters metal 3D printing with the ArcBuilder 3D appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/daihen-20260701-02-1280-720-e1783565745437-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/daihen-enters-metal-3d-printing-with-the-arcbuilder-3d

🖨 Coogee Titanium and University of Queensland to test locally made titanium Coogee Titanium is partnering with the University of Queensland (UQ) on an AU$677,000 (US$469,000) research project to determine whether its locally produced TiRO powder can support a sovereign titanium supply … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 09, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/AMCRC-Coogee-UQ-titanium-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/coogee-titanium-and-university-of-queensland-to-test-locally-made-titanium

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #183 - 2026-07-09
item.description:
🔥 AMufacture Identifies Procurement as a Major Defense Challenge Portsmouth-based 3D print contract manufacturer AMufacture has called on the government to overhaul defense procurement, warning that slow, traditional purchasing processes could prevent UK manufacturers from... The response puts a specific industrial lens on a policy document that commits £5 billion to autonomous systems but leaves open…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 08, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/A-3D-printed-drones-with-Bambu-Lab-3D-printer-in-the-background.-Photo-via-the-British-Army-150x100.jpeg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/amufacture-identifies-procurement-as-a-major-defense-challenge-252927

🚨 Formlabs plans three new printer platforms in the next 12 months after a record quarter Formlabs closed its strongest quarter to date last June, solar Q2 2026, setting company records across several categories: total sales, hardware sales, non-hardware sales, services sales, and SLS sales, the … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 08, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/fusex3-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/formlabs-plans-three-new-printer-platforms-in-the-next-12-months-after-a-record-q3-2026

🚀 AMAA 2026: SMS From Shipyard to Production Floor WAAM’s Role Interested in the future of manufacturing? Don’t miss Additive Manufacturing Advantage: Aerospace, Space and Defense 2026, taking place on July 9th, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 08, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/AMAA-2026-AM-for-Aerospace-Defense-and-Space-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/amaa-2026-sms-from-shipyard-to-production-floor-waams-role-252890

🖨 MX3D Says Framatome Facility Marks ‘New Era’ for Nuclear WAAM French nuclear energy business Framatome has inaugurated a 6,000 m2 additive manufacturing center in Romans-sur-Isère, France. The facility, which opened on July 2, produces metal components for the primary circuits of French nuclear reactors using wire arc additive manufacturing (WAAM) systems supplied by Amsterdam-based MX3D, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 08, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/MX3D-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/mx3d-says-framatome-facility-marks-new-era-for-nuclear-waam-252919

📰 CurifyLabs Secures $14M to Bring Personalized Medicine to More Pharmacies Helsinki-based health technology firm CurifyLabs has closed a $14 million Series A round to grow its automated system for producing personalized medications. The round was co-led by Sandwater and HealthCap, with Tesi and existing backers including Lifeline Ventures joining, alongside participation from U.S, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 08, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/1783291084414-150x100.jpeg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/curifylabs-secures-14m-to-bring-personalized-medicine-to-more-pharmacies-252934

📰 University of Utah researchers print 3D shapes in a single 20-second laser shot University of Utah researchers have developed a 3D printing method that forms an object in about 20 seconds, a process that can take hours using other laser-based printing techniques. The … The post University of Utah researchers print 3D shapes in a single 20-second laser shot appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/University-of-Utah-researchers-print-3D-shapes-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/university-of-utah-researchers-print-3d-shapes-in-a-single-20-second-laser-shot

🚀 Luyten opens early reservations for Ascend A27 tower crane printer Luyten has opened early reservations for the Ascend A27, a system that converts tower cranes into robotic concrete 3D printers, following the platform’s earlier global launch. The Australian construction robotics … The post Luyten opens early reservations for Ascend A27 tower crane printer appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Zrzut-ekranu-2026-06-13-154022-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/luyten-opens-early-reservations-for-ascend-a27-tower-crane-printer

📰 Massivit opens facility in Barcelona to support RapidWings platform RapidWings is based on Massivit's proprietary Cast-In-Motion (CIM) technology and is designed to speed up production lead times for composite tooling. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jul 08, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/07/Opening-of-Europe-Service-Center-to-Support-RapidWings-Platform-CREDIT-Massivit-Reduced-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/massivit-opens-facility-in-barcelona-to-support-rapidwings-platform

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #182 - 2026-07-08
item.description:
🚀 Beehive Industries orders multiple Nikon SLM Solutions NXG 600E systems After placing the biggest order of EOS Onyx metal AM systems, Beehive Industries, an American provider of additively enabled manufacturing solutions for space and A&D, placed a multi-unit, self-funded order … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 07, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/2024_Nikon_SLM_NXG600E_MediumShot_WithoutReflection_Top_Right_290_S-150x150.webp Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/beehive-industries-orders-multiple-nikon-slm-solutions-nxg-600e-systems

🚀 adidas BB.01 Additive basketball shoes launch next week Sportswear giant adidas has been ramping up its use of 3D printing for footwear, not only with its CLIMACOOL sneakers, but also with performance shoe models for various sports, including … The post adidas BB.01... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 07, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/adidas-basketball-1-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/adidas-bb-01-additive-basketball-shoes-launch-next-week

📰 EOS expands aluminum alloy portfolio through partnership with Constellium EOS has entered into a strategic partnership with Constellium, an aluminum alloy developer, to expand its aluminum materials lineup for additive manufacturing. As part of the deal, EOS has added … The post EOS expands aluminum alloy portfolio through partnership with Constellium appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Constellium-and-EOS-agreement-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/eos-expands-aluminum-alloy-portfolio-through-partnership-with-constellium

🦺 Protolabs qualifies Medical White resin on Axtra3D’s Lumia X1 platform Protolabs launched Medical White (MED-WHT 10) for production on Axtra3D‘s Lumia X1 Hi-Speed SLA platform, powered by Hybrid PhotoSynthesis technology. The material became immediately available through Protolabs’ digital manufacturing services, … The post Protolabs qualifies Medical White resin on Axtra3D’s Lumia X1 platform appeared first on VoxelMatters - The... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/medical-white-axtra-protolabs-e1783356267836-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/protolabs-qualifies-medical-white-resin-on-axtra3ds-lumia-x1-platform

🚀 Heading to Farnborough International Airshow? Meet the AeroDef Additive Manufacturing Community first. Farnborough International Airshow will bring the global aerospace, aviation, space, and defence industries to the UK from 20–24 July 2026. But before the sector gathers on the show floor, the additive manufacturing community has an opportunity to connect around one of the most important questions facing aerospace and defence manufacturing today: how, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 07, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/AMAA-2026-AM-for-Aerospace-Defense-and-Space-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/heading-to-farnborough-international-airshow-meet-the-aerodef-additive-manufacturing-community-first-252896

🚀 AMAA 2026: Safran Scales Additive Manufacturing Across Flight-Critical Engine Parts Eighteen months of casting and welding, compressed into three weeks on a single machine. That is what additive manufacturing in aerospace now means in practice at one of the sector’s largest groups, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 07, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/AMAA-2026-AM-for-Aerospace-Defense-and-Space-1-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/amaa-2026-safran-scales-additive-manufacturing-across-flight-critical-engine-parts-252495

💻 Why New US Tariffs Matter More for UK Manufacturers Than the Rate Suggests The Manufacturing Technologies Association (MTA) said new US import duties of 10% to 12.5% on British exports could become a “tipping point” for manufacturers already facing high industrial energy costs and higher... The association warned the added costs could undermine the commercial viability of some contracts in the American market, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 07, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Manufacturing-Technologies-Association-Logo.-Image-via-the-MTA-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/why-new-us-tariffs-matter-more-for-uk-manufacturers-than-the-rate-suggests-252883

📰 AMUG names new board leadership for 2026–2027 term The Additive Manufacturing Users Group (AMUG) has confirmed its board of directors for the 2026–2027 term, combining newly elected members with two board appointments. The five incoming leaders join four continuing board members, with terms beginning July 1, 2026, at a moment when several of AM’s most experienced volunteers are stepping into higher-profile roles within…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 07, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/AMUG_Board_2026-2027-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/amug-names-new-board-leadership-for-2026-2027-term-252862

Reported by TCT Magazine on Jul 06, 2026. Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 06, 2026. 🚀 AMAA 2026: NASA Turns Rocket Alloys Into Flight Ready Hardware Through Iterative Post Processing A combustion chamber with undetected flaws, or a nozzle with clogged internal channels observed during a hot fire test, can set a rocket programme back months. At NASA‘s Marshall Space Flight Center, that risk has pushed engineers to treat additive manufacturing in aerospace as an integrated chain of design, build and post processing steps, where…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 06, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/AMAA-Banner-2024-full-size-1200-x-627-px-1440-x-810-px-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/amaa-2026-nasa-turns-rocket-alloys-into-flight-ready-hardware-through-iterative-post-processing-252724

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #179 - 2026-07-05
item.description:
📰 UC Santa Barbara secures $1.15m NSF grant for two-photon 3D nanoprinting system UC Santa Barbara (UCSB) has received a $1.15 million grant from the National Science Foundation (NSF) to purchase a 3D rapid nanoprinting system based on two-photon photolithography. The equipment will … The post UC Santa Barbara secures $1.15m NSF grant for two-photon 3D nanoprinting system appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/UCSB-NSF-grant-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/uc-santa-barbara-secures-1-15m-nsf-grant-for-two-photon-3d-nanoprinting-system

📰 3D printing on full show at 2026 Tour de France start 3D printing has been a regular feature on the elite-level WorldTour cycling stage for some time now, with saddles being one of the most high-profile (and easy to spot) applications. … The post 3D printing on full show at 2026 Tour de France start appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Tour-de-France-tech-Pinarello-Bolide-F-05-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/3d-printing-on-full-show-at-2026-tour-de-france-start

🖨 OTUS receives a Bambu Lab grant through the Let’s Make It Fund OTUS Project, the American research initiative focused on flying drones through the interiors of tornadoes, announced that it has officially received sponsorship from Bambu Lab under the Let’s Make It … The post OTUS... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 04, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Zrzut-ekranu-2026-07-03-195146-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/otus-receives-a-bambu-lab-grant-through-the-lets-make-it-fund

💻 Australian SMEs Offered up to AU$75,000 in Co-Funding to Test Additive Manufacturing Australia’s Additive Manufacturing Cooperative Research Centre (AMCRC) has unveiled its STARTER Project Funding Program, a AU$3.25 million (approx. US$2.25 million) initiative announced in Melbourne on 1 July 2026 aimed at accelerating additive manufacturing uptake among Australian small and medium-sized enterprises and start-ups, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 04, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/3D_Printer-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/australian-smes-offered-up-to-au75000-in-co-funding-to-test-additive-manufacturing-252824

🚀 Beehive Industries Buys Two Cincinnati Machine Shops US-based propulsion manufacturer Beehive Industries has acquired the assets of Able Tool Corporation and its subsidiary Planet Products Corporation, two precision machine shops in the Greater Cincinnati area. The deal lands as the company’s Frenzy engine moves into full-rate production, following a year of ground and high-altitude testing of the Frenzy 8 and a $29.7…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 04, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Able-and-Planet-Acquisition-Graphic-150x100.webp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/beehive-industries-buys-two-cincinnati-machine-shops-252831

Reported by TCT Magazine on Jul 03, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/printed-part-1-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/application-spotlight-in-house-3d-printing-enables-design-flexibility-cost-savings-for-challenger-3-battle-tank-air-ducting

🚀 Australian SME funding launches to fast-track additive manufacturing adoption “The STARTER Project Funding Program gives businesses a practical pathway to work alongside researchers, test ideas and evaluate how additive manufacturing can improve efficiency, flexibility and competitiveness.” Reported by TCT Magazine on Jul 03, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/07/3D-Printer.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/australian-sme-funding-launches-to-fast-track-additive-manufacturing-adoption

The company prints, performs quality control, packs, … The post 3D printing as a service, Makr3D opens beta for founders appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. The … The post AMPERA completes first full-scale 3D printed reactor module appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. In other words, they make specialized drones for capturing aerial footage, reported by VoxelMatters on Jul 03, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/freefly-3d-printing-3-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/how-freefly-systems-uses-sls-3d-printing-for-its-video-drones

🦺 IU Health Brings 3D Printed Surgical Models In-House Nonprofit healthcare system located in the U.S. Indiana University Health has officially opened its upgraded 3D Print Studio at the 16 Tech Innovation District, marking the occasion with a ceremonial ribbon cutting, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 03, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/pediatric-heart-150x100.webp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/iu-health-brings-3d-printed-surgical-models-in-house-252828

🖨 Velo3D Doubles Down on Domestic Manufacturing with Massive Expansion Metal additive manufacturing company Velo3D has unveiled plans for a 288,747-square-foot production campus in Livermore, California, positioning the site as its future manufacturing hub. The project ranks among the largest metal 3D printing facility developments on the continent and is scheduled to come online before the end of 2026, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jul 03, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/image-1-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/velo3d-doubles-down-on-domestic-manufacturing-with-massive-expansion-252819

📰 Alpine and Lacoste’s one-off A290 Rallye features ERPRO 3D printed seat structures Alpine and Lacoste incorporated 3D printed lattice structures into the rally seats of a one-off car built for their new collaboration, the two French companies confirmed. ERPRO produced the additively … The post Alpine and Lacoste’s one-off A290 Rallye features ERPRO 3D printed seat structures appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Alpine-Lacoste-A290-Rallye-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/alpine-lacoste-3d-printed-seat-structures
